container.heading: Liability of Insurer — Failure to Act in Good Faith

annotations.annotation: Regulations .01—.07 adopted as an emergency provision effective October 17, 2007 (34:23 Md. R. 2022); emergency status extended at 35:9 Md. R. 896; emergency status extended at 35:17 Md. R. 1483
Regulations .01—.07 adopted effective October 20, 2008 (35:21 Md. R. 1828)
Regulation .04A amended effective October 11, 2013 (40:22 Md. R. 1875)
Regulation .05A, E amended effective October 11, 2013 (40:22 Md. R. 1875)
Regulations .01—.07 repealed effective March 27, 2017 (44:6 Md. R. 328)
